subject: LU-12477 ldiskfs: drop SUSE kernel 4.4 and earlier

values.-1: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

This breaks the build for 4.12.14-150.22.
This build uses series/ldiskfs-4.12-sles15-22.series
That file previously had 
 sles12sp2/ext4-misc.patch
but now has
 suse15/ext4-misc.patch

The former contains
 +EXPORT_SYMBOL(ext4_iget);
The latter contains
 +EXPORT_SYMBOL(__ext4_iget);
Uploaded patch set 6.

Looks good to me.

parents.subject: LU-13437 lmv: check stripe FID sanity

commit.subject: LU-12477 ldiskfs: drop SUSE kernel 4.4 and earlier
commit.message:
LU-12477 ldiskfs: drop SUSE kernel 4.4 and earlier

This patch drops ldiskfs support for SLES 12 sp1 through sp3
SLES 12 sp4 and sp5 use an 4.12.14 kernel but no specific
testing has been done for those kernels.

The SUSE 15 ga 4.12.14-150 and sp1 4.12.14-197.7 releases are
tested and known to work.

Remove unused kernel patches for sles and any patches not
referenced in a series

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: Ia13088481b7304d4931ecbb6946a031a851cfe89
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/38268
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Neil Brown <neilb@suse.de>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
